description: State monad alias for memoised Fibonacci
Monadic Fibonacci using HashMap cache via get/modify

statement: theorem mem_iff_mem_toList (t : BinTree α) (x : α) : x ∈ t ↔ x ∈ BinTree.toList t
proof:
by induction t with
| leaf a => grind
| node l r ihl ihr => grind

statement: theorem quickSort_cons (pivot : α) (l : List α) : quickSort (pivot :: l) = quickSort (smaller pivot l) ++ pivot :: quickSort (larger pivot l)
example (a b : Nat) : ValidProgram 0 [push a, push b, add]
def pairs {α β : Type} (l1 : List α) (l2 : List β) : List (α × β)
description: Cartesian product via List monad do-notation

statement: theorem irrational_power_example : ∃ (a b : ℝ), Irrational a ∧ Irrational b ∧ ¬Irrational (a ^ b)
